claim: GroupDRO improves over matched ERM in development evaluation
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: In the controlled development setting, GroupDRO-by-center improves ood_val (center 1) AUROC/AUPRC/sensitivity over its matched center-stratified ERM control (AUROC 0.8956 vs 0.8673).
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: GroupDRO beats its matched ERM control on the reserved center-2 test set (single unseen hospital), controlled same-cache comparison.

claim: GroupDRO improves worst-center behavior in development evaluation
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: In development, GroupDRO improves worst-center (center 4) id_val accuracy/AUROC over the matched ERM control (acc 0.6901 vs 0.8031).
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: GroupDRO's worst-group robustness carries to the reserved test hospital (if supported by the center-2 result).

claim: Calibration improves reliability in development evaluation
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: Temperature scaling improves calibration (ECE/Brier/NLL) on the ood_val subset; the temperature is fit and evaluated on the same split (development-stage).
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: Pre-frozen temperatures reduce ECE/Brier/NLL on the reserved test (still not a separate-split calibration generalization proof).

claim: Calibration is argmax-invariant (does not change decisions)
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: Temperature scaling is argmax-invariant: it rescales confidence but leaves accuracy/AUROC/AUPRC/sensitivity/specificity/FN unchanged.
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: Temperature scaling remains argmax-invariant on the reserved test (mechanical property, not a performance claim).

claim: High-confidence missed tumors are reduced after calibration
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: After calibration, high-confidence false negatives fall sharply on the ood_val subset (GroupDRO conf>=0.90 3922->533; conf>=0.99 1679->0); the total FN count is unchanged.
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: After calibration, high-confidence false negatives are reduced on the reserved center-2 test (development-consistent; total FN unchanged).

claim: GroupDRO has fewer high-confidence false negatives than matched ERM
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: In development, GroupDRO has fewer high-confidence false negatives than its matched ERM control at every confidence threshold, raw and calibrated.
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: GroupDRO retains fewer high-confidence false negatives than matched ERM on the reserved test (if supported).

claim: Candidate operating points recover OOD sensitivity
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: Candidate id_val-selected fixed-specificity operating points give GroupDRO higher ood_val sensitivity than ERM at 4/4 targets (candidate only; not committed).
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: Candidate operating points evaluated on the reserved test (still not a committed clinical threshold).

claim: Hospital shift causes severe reliability degradation
wording_allowed_before_ood_test: Hospital-domain shift causes severe reliability degradation in the development setting (accuracy/AUROC/sensitivity drop from id_val to ood_val).
wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: (unchanged) Shift degrades reliability; the reserved-test result quantifies degradation on one unseen hospital.

wording_after_ood_test_if_supported: held-out generalization on the reserved center-2 test set (single unseen hospital); not multi-hospital/population generalization.
